contract.name: Scholarship income and age eligibility
contract.description: A reviewer-submitted policy with an inclusive income boundary and a disability age exception.

citation.quote:
[Page 1]
N
NIYAM DEMO POLICY BOARD
APPROVED POLICY / 2026
Scholarship Eligibility Policy
The exact rules the scholarship decision software must implement
EFFECTIVE FROM
1 August 2026
Approved eligibility conditions
Document NS-2026-04  |  Version 4
01
ANNUAL HOUSEHOLD INCOME
Applicants with annual household income up to and including INR 437,500 are eligible.
02
STANDARD AGE LIMIT
Applicants must be 27 years old or younger.
03
DISABILITY EXCEPTION
Applicants with disabilities receive a 4 year age relaxation.
AUTHORITY BOUNDARY
These rules become executable only after policy-owner approval. A software repair requires separate engineer
review. No automated system may merge or deploy a change without those approvals.
Niyam records the page citation and SHA-256 document hash at upload.
Page 1 of 1

onPass.label: Eligible
onPass.explanation: The approved income and age conditions are satisfied.

onFail.label: Not eligible
onFail.explanation: At least one approved income or age condition is not satisfied.

textualDiff: - Applicants with annual household income up to and including INR 300,000 are eligible.
- Applicants must be 25 years old or younger.
- Applicants with disabilities receive a 5 year age relaxation.

generatedCounterexample.explanation: Node production evaluated income 437500 < 250000 and age 31 <= 25; disability=true.

productionResponse.explanation: Node production evaluated income 437500 < 250000 and age 31 <= 25; disability=true.

before.explanation: Node production evaluated income 437500 < 250000 and age 31 <= 25; disability=true.

after.explanation: Node production evaluated income 437500 <= 437500 and age 31 <= 31; disability=true.

adversarialReview.claim: Behavioral verification over generated boundary and interaction cases; not universal formal proof.

approvals.name: policy-owner approver
approvals.statement: Confirmed that the repair preserves the approved interpretation.

approvals.name: engineer approver
approvals.statement: Confirmed that the patch and verification evidence are safe to review.
